MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry F. Dorfman; Clerk: B. Paredes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Fastnet Group is present. Represented by Dora Estrada.
Attorney David Foran for the plaintiff.
Defendant James Frescura is present.
Attorney Misti M. Schmidt appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Sep-09-2013 is vacated. (D501/JPT)
